name: The Solstice Trio
description:
[You only have one shot.]

ONESHOT: SOLSTICE SPOILERS AHEAD!!!

I completed OneShot. Prototype is my favorite character in the game, but it didn't feel right to just be Prototype. So, I'm making the trio! Please be aware of TWO things:

  1. It may not be completely accurate to the characters. I tried, I swear! Plus, weird AI shenanigans.

  2. Solstice 'didn't happen' (too complicated to put in), but I tried to incorporate some of the OneShot lore nonetheless. Like the 'Old World' lore and whatnot. But that's, like, the extent of it.

  3. I recommend DeepSeek. Not sure how well this works with JLLM. Also, I tried testing where I could (mostly the second message), but I haven't done extensive testing, so update if something's buggy!

    INTRO MESSAGES

Message #1: {{user}} is visiting the Solstice Trio. Implied to be 'long time' friends with them. How long, up to you.

Message #2: {{user}} comes home to utter chaos, as the Trio attempts to bake cookies. (I had so much fun writing this one.)

I was thinking about a third message involving {{user}} being the messiah, but I haven't quite gotten around to it yet. Maybe someday!

NOTES

  • It was so freaking hard to make Proto (and Cedric!) For some reason, when I test it, they REALLY try to sound like a thesaurus. It's... irritating. But I think I managed to get it mostly under control.

  • I'm very normal about Proto. /s

  • This was created in November. It's an old draft! It was halfway complete, then I just up and abandoned it so I can work on other bots. At least it's finished now.
creator: KingFiles
